MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF A.D.J.LTD.,A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-21-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 05 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-28-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE DIANE WICK/S. NAYLOR, REPORTER ADAM BARASCH FOR PLTF. DEFT PRESENT 2:45 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PRESENT, DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS RECITED ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTIT. OF THE PREM. AT 508 LARKIN STREET, #307, SF CA, RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED, $1,452.00 RENTS/DAMAGES, PLTF. WAIVES COST/FEES. JUDGMENT STAYED ON CONDITION THAT DEFT PAYS IN CASH TODAY IN OPEN COURT $968.00 TO THE PLTF. THAT DEFT SHALL MAKE RENT PAYMENTS OF $484.00 BEG. 1/5/94 & CONT. FOR 6 MONTHS BY MONEY ORDER OR CERTIFIED CHECK W/ 5 DAYS GRACE PERIOD UNTIL 6/94. DEFT TO PAY INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS OF $86.67 BEG. 1/15/94 W/ A 2 DAYS GRACE PERIOD UNTIL BALANCE OF JUDGMENT IS PAID OFF. IF DEFT FAILS TO PERFORM CONDI- TIONS, PLTF. ON EX-PARTE APPLICATION W/ 48 HOURS NOTICE TO DEFT HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED & WRIT ISSUED. IF ALL TERMS ARE COMPLIED WITH, PLTF. WILL FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. PLTF. TO PREPARE STIP.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF A.D.J.LTD.,A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT BAKARI, NEBIAT DOES 1 TO X , INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT BAKARI, NEBIAT
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT BAKARI, NEBIAT
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT BAKARI, NEBIAT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAKARI, NEBIAT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 508 LARKIN STREET, #307, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA. $1,452.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,452.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. PLTF RCVD $968 AS PARTIAL PAYMENT. DEFT TO PAY BAL AT $86.67/M STARTING 1/15/94 W/ 2-D GRACE PERIOD AND TO PAY RENT BY 5TH OF EACH MONTH STARTING JAN FOR THE NEXT 6 MONTHS. IF NOT, THEN WRIT MAY BE ISSUED IMMED UPON EX PARTE APPLIC W/ 48 HRS NOTICE TO DEFTS.
